zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna Soddington於大約1274年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾索丁頓時，她的父親William Ralph de Soddington25歲，母親Anne de Lou40歲。她於1294年之前與Walter Blount在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1331年之後在英國英格蘭，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾索丁頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanna Soddington于大约1274年出生在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾索丁頓时，她的父亲William Ralph de Soddington25岁，母亲Anne de Lou40岁。她于1294年之前与Walter Blount在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1331年之后在英国英格兰，埋葬在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾索丁頓。

nameMeanings.name: Soddington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire and Lincolnshire): habitational name from any of various places, for example in Cheshire, Derbyshire, Herefordshire, and Nottinghamshire, named Coddington, from the Old English personal name Cot(t)a + -ing- denoting association + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna Soddington was born about 1274, in Sodington, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Ralph de Soddington, was 25 and her mother, Anne de Lou, was 40. She married Walter Blount before 1294, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 1331, in England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Sodington, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna Soddington est née environ 1274, à Sodington, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Ralph de Soddington, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Anne de Lou, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Walter Blount avant 1294, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 1331, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Sodington, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johanna Soddington um 1274 in Sodington, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Ralph de Soddington 25 und ihre Mutter Anne de Lou 40. Sie hat vor 1294 in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Walter Blount geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1331 in England, United Kingdom und wurde in Sodington, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Soddington è nata il circa 1274 nel Sodington, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Ralph de Soddington, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Anne de Lou, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Walter Blount prima del 1294, nel Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1331, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Sodington, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanna Soddingtonが約1274年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアソディントンで生まれた時，父William Ralph de Soddingtonは25歳，母Anne de Louは40歳であった。1294年以前にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアでWalter Blountと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1331年以後にイギリスイギリスで死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアソディントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna Soddington(이)가 대략 1274년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 소딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Ralph de Soddington(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne de Lou(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1294년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 Walter Blount(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1331년 이후 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 소딩턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Soddington nasceu aproximadamente 1274, em Sodington, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Ralph de Soddington, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Anne de Lou, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter Blount antes 1294, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1331, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Sodington, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna Soddington родилась около 1274 г. в местности содингтон, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Ralph de Soddington было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne de Lou, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter Blount перед 1294 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 1331 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности содингтон, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johanna Soddington nació aproximadamente 1274, en Sodington, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Ralph de Soddington, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Anne de Lou, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Walter Blount antes de 1294, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1331, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Sodington, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
